shard_scope: cortex_m7_systick TB implementation: cocotb directed/table-driven micro-TB with an independent SysTickModel reference oracle for the 12 CONTRACT_SYST_* / 16 SCN_SYST_* scenarios. Writes restricted to cortex_m7_systick/tb/ and cortex_m7_systick/knowledge/subagents/.
checks_run: python3 cortex_m7_systick/tb/test_cortex_m7_systick.py (reference-model self-test _self_test) -> REFERENCE MODEL SELF-TEST: PASS (11 oracle assertions)
grep expected_source kinds -> only behavior_model/cycle_rules (no dut_output/rtl as expected); observed_source kinds only monitor/dut_signal
grep EVT_SYST_* -> all 16 planned scoreboard row ids present incl negatives (_OFF/_FORCED/_WRITE_NOINT/_REENABLE)

architecture: predictor: SysTickModel (independent cycle-accurate Python oracle; never reads DUT)
driver: ApbDriver (apb_write/apb_read/reset_dut/model_program/step_clocks) - APB-lite CSR + clock/reset stimulus only
monitor: TickMonitor + CVR/CSR reads - DUT-facing observation of prdata/CURRENT/COUNTFLAG/tick_irq only
scoreboard: Scoreboard - emits scoreboard_rows.v1; drops coverage_refs on failed rows
coverage: COV map - contract-linked coverage refs attached only to passing rows
stimulus_strategy: directed scenarios for all 12 contracts + 5 negative/corner scenarios
lock-step counter runner step_clocks() advances DUT and oracle together
light constrained-random RELOAD for SCN_SYST_PERIOD: CONSTRAINT_SYST_RELOAD_SMALL reload in [2,8], seed 0xCAFE, coverage goal COV_SYST_PERIOD
coverage_strategy: COV_SYST_* attached to passing rows only; failed rows carry no coverage_refs
12 contract-linked coverage goals, one per objective

random_stimulus.constraint: reload integer in [2,8] inclusive; deterministic seed 0xCAFE
random_stimulus.rationale: short wrap periods so >=2 full periods observed in bounded sim while sampling distinct RELOAD+1 values

assertions_checked: period(RELOAD=4)=5 clocks and CURRENT=0 visible exactly one cycle
RELOAD=0 inert: holds 0, no tick, never 0xFFFFFF
CVR write clears CURRENT and COUNTFLAG, reloads RVR next clk, no tick (no-int)
tick_irq single-cycle pulse on natural 1->0 with TICKINT=1 (2 per 2 periods)
TICKINT=0: wrap sets COUNTFLAG but no tick_irq
COUNTFLAG clears on functional CSR read, not on CSR/RVR write
disable freezes; re-enable resumes from held value with no spurious reload
CLKSOURCE forced to 1 under NOREF=1; write of 0 ignored

full_sim_reason: RTL authored in parallel by RTL agent; Phase 5 runs the simulation and produces sim/ evidence

dispatch_verify.shard_attributable_issues: none (schema OK, dispatch_id/dispatch_path/receipt_path match, may_claim_complete=false, status HANDOFF_PASS, no OWNED_PATH_OUT_OF_SCOPE, no GENERATED_PATH_OUT_OF_SCOPE)
dispatch_verify.actual_path_out_of_scope_note: The verifier diffs the whole IP tree against the dispatch baseline and reports two ACTUAL_PATH_OUT_OF_SCOPE entries that were written by the PARALLEL RTL agent, not by this TB shard: cortex_m7_systick/rtl/cortex_m7_systick.v and cortex_m7_systick/knowledge/dispatches/DISPATCH_CORTEX_M7_SYSTICK_RTL_IMPLEMENTATION_20260623T174041Z_A1F3407F.json. This TB agent never opened or wrote those paths; its only writes are the three owned changed_paths under cortex_m7_systick/tb/ and cortex_m7_systick/knowledge/subagents/. The flag is an expected artifact of concurrent RTL+TB dispatch sharing one baseline, not a scope breach by this shard.

rocev_traceability: Requirement(REQ_SYST_*) -> Obligation(OBL_SYST_*) -> Contract(CONTRACT_SYST_*) -> Evidence(scoreboard_rows.v1 via SCN_SYST_*/EVT_SYST_*) -> Validation(deferred to Phase 5 sim + validator) -> Decision(gate-owned, not claimed here)
